Digital Archive • v2.0

CREATOR // EXPLORER // CHESS PLAYER

I building tools and capturing memories.

Hey, I'm Sagheer. I'm a student exploring software engineering, automation, and the art of photography. I enjoy building small tools, learning tech at my own pace, and making my digital space a little better every day.

Tech & Tools

I spend my time learning Python and building small utilities that make life easier. Whether it's automation scripts or diving into new frameworks, I love the feeling of watching a piece of logic come to life.

Beyond the Code

When I'm not at the screen, I'm likely holding a camera, solving a Rubik's cube, or lost in a game of chess. I believe a perfect day is a mix of aesthetic design, a bit of learning, and a good challenge.

The Toolkit

Python
Git
VS Code
Linux
Photoshop

Learning

Software Eng

Passions

Photography

Hobbies

Chess & Cubing

Energy

Aesthetic Design

Metrics & Progress

The Focus

Automation Scripts

Simple utilities for workflows, file automation, and digital experiments. High efficiency, low friction.

Photography Showcase

Aesthetic projects and edits. Capturing the world through a lens that values light and silence.

Data Explorations

Analyzing datasets and exploring new ways to visualize information. Built to understand how systems work from the inside out.

Fun Facts

  • I have a thing for aesthetic designs
  • Learning a bit every day is my core loop
  • Tech, Chess, and Rubik’s Cubes are my trio
  • My contribution graph is turning greener daily

Let's explore it.
